question: Find the year since 2001 with the highest total unemployment-insurance beneficiaries. Then, for Texas counties that rank in the top five by average summer meal program sites from the school year starting two years before that year through the school year ending four years after, identify the county that in 2022 has under 12% of its population age 65+ and more than 3,000 children served in family preservation services. Return the county name in `County` format. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: In this dataset, summing Beneficiaries across all records by Year, 2020 has the highest total beneficiaries at 11,355,300.
1.subquestion: Which year has the highest total number of individuals receiving regular unemployment insurance benefits starting from 2001? (Group by Year; sum Beneficiaries; choose the maximum.)

2.fact: In 2018-2019 (<node_1 answer> - 2 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1052), DALLAS (1014), HIDALGO (494), BEXAR (411), TARRANT (367).
2.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> - 2 school year (2018-2019)? (Filter: ProgramYear == '2018-2019'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

3.fact: In 2019-2020 (<node_1 answer> - 1 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1919), DALLAS (1479), BEXAR (1038), TARRANT (688), HIDALGO (515).
3.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> - 1 school year (2019-2020)? (Filter: ProgramYear == '2019-2020'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

4.fact: In 2020-2021 (<node_1 answer> school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (2674), DALLAS (1504), BEXAR (1168), TARRANT (1033), HIDALGO (700).
4.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> school year (2020-2021)? (Filter: ProgramYear == '2020-2021'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

5.fact: In 2021-2022 (<node_1 answer> + 1 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1825), DALLAS (1545), BEXAR (814), TARRANT (757), HIDALGO (526).
5.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> + 1 school year (2021-2022)? (Filter: ProgramYear == '2021-2022'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

6.fact: In 2022-2023 (<node_1 answer> + 2 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1016), DALLAS (688), BEXAR (364), HIDALGO (353), TARRANT (303).
6.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> + 2 school year (2022-2023)? (Filter: ProgramYear == '2022-2023'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

7.fact: In 2022, among the top 5 counties by average summer meal sites, Harris (11.2%) and Dallas (11.5%) had less than 12% of their population aged 65 and older, while Bexar (13.1%), Tarrant (13.1%), and Hidalgo (12.3%) had 12% or more.
7.subquestion: Which counties from <nodes 2-6 top 5 by average: Harris, Dallas, Bexar, Tarrant, Hidalgo> had less than 12% of their population aged 65 and older in 2022? (Filter: Fiscal Year == 2022; use '65 and older: % of Population' < 12.)

8.fact: In 2022, among the top 5 counties by average summer meal sites, Harris (3312), Bexar (4612), and Tarrant (3101) had more than 3000 children served in family preservation services, while Dallas (2582) and Hidalgo (882) had fewer.
8.subquestion: Which counties from <nodes 2-6 top 5 by average: Harris, Dallas, Bexar, Tarrant, Hidalgo> had more than 3000 children served in family preservation services in 2022? (Filter: Fiscal Year == 2022; sum 'Children served in FBSS Family Preservation Services' by County across race/ethnicity; keep > 3000.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Unemployment Insurance Beneficiaries dataset -> Year with highest total beneficiaries -> 2020 (11,355,300)
AGGREGATION: Compute average across all 5 years -> Top 5 are {HARRIS: 1697.2, DALLAS: 1246.0, BEXAR: 759.0, TARRANT: 629.6, HIDALGO: 517.6}
Node 8: From top 5, family preservation > 3000 -> {Harris, Bexar, Tarrant}
